input.memoryNote: I found out because you left yourself logged in on Mom's computer and I saw the sent folder. Twelve years of Santa replies. You'd adjusted the font, the tone, the lore — every year. By 2013 'Santa' was using emojis. By 2015 he had strong opinions about my homework. You built an entire fictional relationship and I didn't know it was you. That might be the most loving thing anyone has ever done for me.

meta.tiktokHook: My brother kept me believing in Santa until age 12. I found the sent folder. 12 years of replies. He adapted the lore every year. By 2015 Santa had opinions about my homework.
meta.caption: 12 years. zero credit. happy birthday to him.
meta.whyItWorks: 'Santa had opinions about my homework' is instantly quotable. Every sibling in the comments will tag their person.
